requirement_topic.en: NEA Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for Lamps
requirement_topic.zh: NEA 灯具最低能效标准（MEPS）
requirement_topic.zht: NEA 燈具最低能效標準（MEPS）

summary.en: Singapore's energy efficiency for lighting is administered by the National Environment Agency (NEA), not Enterprise Singapore. Under the Environmental Protection and Management Act and its energy-conservation regulations, NEA operates Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for regulated lamps: in-scope lamp types must meet a minimum efficacy (lm/W) and other performance criteria to be registered and supplied in Singapore, and lamp types that fail MEPS are progressively phased out (Singapore has phased out inefficient incandescent and certain halogen lamps). The scope, efficacy thresholds, lifetime and other criteria are set by NEA and updated over time, so the specific MEPS tier applicable to a given LED lamp must be checked against the current NEA requirements. MEPS applies to the regulated lamp category rather than to every luminaire; integrated luminaires and non-regulated products may fall outside MEPS.
summary.zh: 新加坡照明能效由国家环境局（NEA）管理，而非企业发展局。依据《环境保护与管理法》及其节能法规，NEA 对受管制灯具实施最低能效标准（MEPS）：范围内灯具类型须达到最低光效（lm/W）及其他性能标准方可在新加坡注册及供应，未达 MEPS 的灯具类型逐步淘汰（新加坡已淘汰低效白炽灯及部分卤素灯）。适用范围、光效阈值、寿命及其他标准由 NEA 设定并随时间更新，因此特定 LED 灯适用的具体 MEPS 级别须对照现行 NEA 要求核查。MEPS 适用于受管制灯具类别，而非每一件灯具；一体化灯具及非受管制产品可能不在 MEPS 范围内。
summary.zht: 新加坡照明能效由國家環境局（NEA）管理，而非企業發展局。依據《環境保護與管理法》及其節能法規，NEA 對受管制燈具實施最低能效標準（MEPS）：範圍內燈具類型須達到最低光效（lm/W）及其他性能標準方可在新加坡注冊及供應，未達 MEPS 的燈具類型逐步淘汰（新加坡已淘汰低效白熾燈及部分鹵素燈）。適用範圍、光效閾值、壽命及其他標準由 NEA 設定並隨時間更新，因此特定 LED 燈適用的具體 MEPS 級別須對照現行 NEA 要求核查。MEPS 適用於受管制燈具類別，而非每一件燈具；一體化燈具及非受管制產品可能不在 MEPS 範圍內。

standards_or_laws: Environmental Protection and Management Act (Singapore) and energy-conservation regulations — NEA Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for regulated lamps
NEA registration of regulated goods (energy performance) — current efficacy/performance thresholds per NEA requirements

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), which defines three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest) ≥90 lm/W; Grade 2 ≥80 lm/W; Grade 3 ≥70 lm/W. Grade 3 is the minimum required for market entry in China. China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products, administered by SAMR (with CQC/CECP). The Chinese grade is set against absolute lm/W thresholds and is registered domestically; it does not satisfy or transfer to NEA's MEPS registration in Singapore.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）≥90 lm/W；2 级 ≥80 lm/W；3 级 ≥70 lm/W。3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）（连同 CQC/CECP）管理。中国等级依据绝对 lm/W 阈值设定并在国内注册；其不满足也不转移至新加坡 NEA 的 MEPS 注册。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）≥90 lm/W；2 級 ≥80 lm/W；3 級 ≥70 lm/W。3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）（連同 CQC/CECP）管理。中國等級依據絕對 lm/W 閾值設定並在國內注冊；其不滿足也不轉移至新加坡 NEA 的 MEPS 注冊。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both regimes set a minimum efficacy floor, but the framework and the administering body differ. Key gaps for a Chinese exporter: (1) energy is regulated by NEA in Singapore (separate from the Enterprise Singapore SAFETY Mark), so an extra NEA registration step applies for in-scope lamps — the China CEL registration does not transfer; (2) the specific MEPS efficacy/lifetime thresholds are set by NEA and may differ from the GB 30255 grade boundaries, so a product passing a given CN grade is not automatically MEPS-compliant — verify against current NEA thresholds; (3) MEPS scope is defined by NEA's regulated lamp categories, which may differ from the GB 30255 scope (e.g. integrated luminaires vs replaceable lamps); (4) test reports must conform to NEA's required test methods and be from an accepted laboratory. Manufacturers should confirm whether the specific product is a regulated lamp under MEPS and meets the current efficacy/performance thresholds before supply.
gap.zh: 两套制度均设定最低光效下限，但框架及主管机构不同。中国出口商的主要差距：（1）新加坡能效由 NEA 管理（独立于企业发展局 SAFETY 安全标志），因此范围内灯具须额外进行 NEA 注册——中国 CEL 注册不转移；（2）具体 MEPS 光效/寿命阈值由 NEA 设定，可能与 GB 30255 等级边界不同，因此通过某一中国等级的产品不自动符合 MEPS——须对照现行 NEA 阈值验证；（3）MEPS 适用范围由 NEA 受管制灯具类别界定，可能与 GB 30255 范围不同（如一体化灯具与可更换灯）；（4）检测报告须符合 NEA 要求的检测方法并来自被接受的实验室。制造商应在供应前确认具体产品是否为 MEPS 下的受管制灯具并达到现行光效/性能阈值。
gap.zht: 兩套制度均設定最低光效下限，但框架及主管機構不同。中國出口商的主要差距：（1）新加坡能效由 NEA 管理（獨立於企業發展局 SAFETY 安全標誌），因此範圍內燈具須額外進行 NEA 注冊——中國 CEL 注冊不轉移；（2）具體 MEPS 光效/壽命閾值由 NEA 設定，可能與 GB 30255 等級邊界不同，因此通過某一中國等級的產品不自動符合 MEPS——須對照現行 NEA 閾值驗證；（3）MEPS 適用範圍由 NEA 受管制燈具類別界定，可能與 GB 30255 範圍不同（如一體化燈具與可更換燈）；（4）檢測報告須符合 NEA 要求的檢測方法並來自被接受的實驗室。製造商應在供應前確認具體產品是否為 MEPS 下的受管制燈具並達到現行光效/性能閾值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — regulated lamps must meet NEA MEPS efficacy/performance thresholds and be registered with NEA before supply in Singapore; non-compliant lamp types are phased out. Confirm scope and thresholds against current NEA requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] In Singapore, lamp energy performance is regulated by NEA (separate from the Enterprise Singapore SAFETY Mark) through MEPS, requiring in-scope regulated lamps to meet minimum efficacy/performance thresholds and be registered with NEA before supply. China's GB 30255 grades and CEL registration do not transfer to NEA, and the MEPS thresholds and scope may differ from the GB 30255 grade boundaries. Confirm whether the product is a regulated lamp under MEPS and meets current NEA thresholds, and complete NEA registration as required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在新加坡，灯具能效由 NEA 管理（独立于企业发展局 SAFETY 安全标志），通过 MEPS 要求范围内受管制灯具达到最低光效/性能阈值并在供应前向 NEA 注册。中国 GB 30255 等级及 CEL 注册不转移至 NEA，且 MEPS 阈值及范围可能与 GB 30255 等级边界不同。请确认产品是否为 MEPS 下的受管制灯具并达到现行 NEA 阈值，并按要求完成 NEA 注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在新加坡，燈具能效由 NEA 管理（獨立於企業發展局 SAFETY 安全標誌），通過 MEPS 要求範圍內受管制燈具達到最低光效/性能閾值並在供應前向 NEA 注冊。中國 GB 30255 等級及 CEL 注冊不轉移至 NEA，且 MEPS 閾值及範圍可能與 GB 30255 等級邊界不同。請確認產品是否為 MEPS 下的受管制燈具並達到現行 NEA 閾值，並按要求完成 NEA 注冊。

requirement_topic.en: NEA Mandatory Energy Labelling Scheme (MELS / Energy Label) for Lamps
requirement_topic.zh: NEA 强制能效标签计划（MELS / 能源标签）——灯具
requirement_topic.zht: NEA 強制能效標籤計劃（MELS / 能源標籤）——燈具

summary.en: The National Environment Agency (NEA) runs the Mandatory Energy Labelling Scheme (MELS), under which regulated goods must display the Singapore Energy Label (a tick-rating label showing energy efficiency, typically a 1-to-5 ticks system, plus annual energy cost information) before they are supplied. Where lamps are a registered goods category under MELS, the supplier must register the model with NEA, obtain the energy rating, and affix the Singapore Energy Label to the product/packaging and show it at point of sale. The label rating is derived from the product's measured efficacy and the applicable NEA rating bands. The exact categories covered by MELS and the rating methodology are set by NEA and updated over time, so confirm whether the specific LED lamp is in scope and the current label format before supply.
summary.zh: 国家环境局（NEA）实施强制能效标签计划（MELS），受管制货品在供应前须显示新加坡能源标签（以勾号评级显示能效，通常为 1 至 5 个勾号，并附年度能源费用信息）。若灯具属于 MELS 下的受管制货品类别，供应商须就型号向 NEA 注册、取得能效评级，并在产品/包装上加贴新加坡能源标签且在销售点展示。标签评级依据产品实测光效及适用的 NEA 评级区间得出。MELS 涵盖的具体类别及评级方法由 NEA 设定并随时间更新，因此供应前请确认具体 LED 灯是否在范围内及现行标签格式。
summary.zht: 國家環境局（NEA）實施強制能效標籤計劃（MELS），受管制貨品在供應前須顯示新加坡能源標籤（以勾號評級顯示能效，通常為 1 至 5 個勾號，並附年度能源費用信息）。若燈具屬於 MELS 下的受管制貨品類別，供應商須就型號向 NEA 注冊、取得能效評級，並在產品/包裝上加貼新加坡能源標籤且在銷售點展示。標籤評級依據產品實測光效及適用的 NEA 評級區間得出。MELS 涵蓋的具體類別及評級方法由 NEA 設定並隨時間更新，因此供應前請確認具體 LED 燈是否在範圍內及現行標籤格式。

standards_or_laws: Environmental Protection and Management Act (Singapore) and energy-labelling regulations — NEA Mandatory Energy Labelling Scheme (MELS) / Singapore Energy Label
NEA registration of regulated goods (energy labelling) — current label format and rating bands per NEA requirements

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires. Products must be registered with CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) or via CECP (China Energy Conservation Programme) before affixing the CEL. The CEL shows Grade 1–3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds and is administered by SAMR. There is no mutual recognition between the NEA MELS / Singapore Energy Label and the CN CEL registration scheme — the label artwork, rating methodology and registry are different.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。产品须在贴附中国能效标识前向中国质量认证中心（CQC）或通过中国节能产品认证（CECP）注册。CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1–3 级，由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。NEA MELS / 新加坡能源标签与中国能效标识注册方案之间不存在互认——标签图样、评级方法及注册系统均不同。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。產品須在貼附中國能效標識前向中國質量認證中心（CQC）或通過中國節能產品認證（CECP）注冊。CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1–3 級，由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。NEA MELS / 新加坡能源標籤與中國能效標識注冊方案之間不存在互認——標籤圖樣、評級方法及注冊系統均不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Where lamps are in scope of MELS, a Singapore Energy Label and NEA registration are mandatory pre-supply steps with no CN equivalent transfer: the Chinese CEL does not substitute for the NEA registration or the Singapore Energy Label. The label designs and rating systems are not comparable — Singapore uses a tick-rating with annual energy cost, while China uses a Grade 1–3 label on absolute lm/W. Gaps: (1) register the lamp model with NEA and obtain the Singapore Energy Label before supply; (2) recompute the rating using NEA's methodology and bands (a high CN grade does not map to a fixed Singapore tick rating); (3) produce label artwork in the NEA-prescribed format, in English, and display it at point of sale and on packaging; (4) confirm the specific lamp category is currently covered by MELS, since not all luminaires are in scope. This NEA labelling obligation is separate from the Enterprise Singapore SAFETY Mark safety registration.
gap.zh: 若灯具属于 MELS 范围，新加坡能源标签及 NEA 注册为强制性供应前步骤，且无中国对应转移：中国 CEL 不替代 NEA 注册或新加坡能源标签。标签设计及评级体系不可比——新加坡采用带年度能源费用的勾号评级，中国采用基于绝对 lm/W 的 1–3 级标签。差距：（1）供应前就灯具型号向 NEA 注册并取得新加坡能源标签；（2）采用 NEA 的方法及区间重新计算评级（高中国等级不映射为固定的新加坡勾号评级）；（3）以 NEA 规定格式、英文制作标签图样，并在销售点及包装上展示；（4）确认具体灯具类别现行是否纳入 MELS，因为并非所有灯具均在范围内。此 NEA 标签义务独立于企业发展局 SAFETY 安全标志安全注册。
gap.zht: 若燈具屬於 MELS 範圍，新加坡能源標籤及 NEA 注冊為強制性供應前步驟，且無中國對應轉移：中國 CEL 不替代 NEA 注冊或新加坡能源標籤。標籤設計及評級體系不可比——新加坡採用帶年度能源費用的勾號評級，中國採用基於絕對 lm/W 的 1–3 級標籤。差距：（1）供應前就燈具型號向 NEA 注冊並取得新加坡能源標籤；（2）採用 NEA 的方法及區間重新計算評級（高中國等級不映射為固定的新加坡勾號評級）；（3）以 NEA 規定格式、英文製作標籤圖樣，並在銷售點及包裝上展示；（4）確認具體燈具類別現行是否納入 MELS，因為並非所有燈具均在範圍內。此 NEA 標籤義務獨立於企業發展局 SAFETY 安全標誌安全注冊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — regulated lamps under MELS must be registered with NEA and display the Singapore Energy Label before supply. Confirm scope and current label format against NEA requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where LED lamps are in scope of NEA's Mandatory Energy Labelling Scheme, the Singapore Energy Label and NEA model registration are mandatory before supply, and are separate from the Enterprise Singapore SAFETY Mark. China's CEL registration and Grade 1–3 label do not transfer to NEA — the rating systems and label artwork differ, and the rating must be recomputed using NEA's methodology. Confirm whether the specific lamp is currently covered by MELS, register with NEA, and produce the Singapore Energy Label in the prescribed English-language format for packaging and point of sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若 LED 灯具属于 NEA 强制能效标签计划范围，供应前须取得新加坡能源标签并完成 NEA 型号注册，且独立于企业发展局 SAFETY 安全标志。中国 CEL 注册及 1–3 级标签不转移至 NEA——评级体系及标签图样不同，须采用 NEA 方法重新计算评级。请确认具体灯具现行是否纳入 MELS、向 NEA 注册，并以规定的英文格式制作用于包装及销售点的新加坡能源标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若 LED 燈具屬於 NEA 強制能效標籤計劃範圍，供應前須取得新加坡能源標籤並完成 NEA 型號注冊，且獨立於企業發展局 SAFETY 安全標誌。中國 CEL 注冊及 1–3 級標籤不轉移至 NEA——評級體系及標籤圖樣不同，須採用 NEA 方法重新計算評級。請確認具體燈具現行是否納入 MELS、向 NEA 注冊，並以規定的英文格式製作用於包裝及銷售點的新加坡能源標籤。
